description: High-contrast, energetic, and vibrant design specifically for creative marketing tools. Breaks standard SaaS conventions by using sharp borders, brutalist shadows, and high-impact typography to inspire creativity and action.

headings.usage: Use for all page titles, dashboard numbers, and marketing copy. Apply tracking-tight for sizes text-2xl and above.

body.usage: Use for all UI text, form labels, paragraph descriptions, and tabular data.

visual_enhancers.textures: Include a subtle noise overlay (opacity 0.03) or dot pattern on the main background for tactile feel.

layouts.global: Sticky left sidebar (width ~280px) with 1px solid black right border. Main content area with generous padding (p-8 or p-12).
layouts.dashboard: Bento Grid (Mode B). Top row: 4 stat cards (col-span-1). Second row: Content Usage Chart (col-span-2), Growth Chart (col-span-2). Third row: Recent Activity Feed.
layouts.generator: Split-screen layout (Grid-cols-1). On large screens (lg:grid-cols-12): Left panel (col-span-5) for form inputs, sticky behavior. Right panel (col-span-7) for AI outputs (Social Media, Email, Meta Ads). Use Tabs to switch between output types.
layouts.library: Masonry or CSS Grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3). Cards show campaign preview image, type tag, and date.
layouts.settings: Max-width centered container (max-w-3xl) with clear vertical sections for profile and account settings.

motion.buttons: Hover: translate-x-[-2px] translate-y-[-2px] with brutalist_md shadow. Active/Click: translate-x-[2px] translate-y-[2px] with brutalist_active shadow.
motion.cards: Initial page load: Framer motion stagger fade-in and slight slide-up (y: 20 -> 0).
motion.generator_output: When content is generating, use an energetic loading state (e.g., repeating fast-marquee of brand text or pulsing colored blocks). When complete, fade in the output cards.

components.name: Button
components.instructions: Use hard borders (border-2 border-black), rounded-md. Primary buttons use bg-[#FF5722] text-white. Secondary use bg-[#FFCC00] text-black. Apply motion states defined above.

components.name: Card
components.instructions: White background, rounded-xl, 2px solid black border, brutalist_md shadow. Padding MUST be generous (p-6 or p-8). Avoid muddy shadows.

components.name: Input / Textarea
components.instructions: border-2 border-black, rounded-md, bg-white. Focus state: outline-none ring-4 ring-[#FF5722]/30. Generous padding (p-3).

components.name: Badges / Tags
components.instructions: Small pill-shaped (rounded-full), uppercase text, tracking-wider, text-xs, 1px solid black border.

components.name: Dropdown / Select
components.instructions: Use Shadcn Select but customize to match the thick borders and brutalist shadows. DO NOT use transparent backgrounds for the dropdown list.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure minimum 4.5:1 ratio for normal text. Black text on colored backgrounds is preferred for Neo-brutalist style.
accessibility.focus: All interactive elements must have a visible focus ring.
accessibility.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='generate-campaign-btn').

image_urls.description: Neon sneaker product shot for AI generated social media poster preview.
Perfume cosmetic product shot for Meta Ad preview.

instructions_to_main_agent: You are working with .js and .jsx files. Do not create or use .tsx files.
Install and use 'lucide-react' for all icons. Set strokeWidth={2.5} to match the bold brutalist aesthetic.
Use 'recharts' for the Dashboard charts. Theme the charts using #FF5722 and #FFCC00. Do not use default gray/blue colors.
Use 'framer-motion' to orchestrate page load animations and state transitions, particularly for the generator output.
Never use generic placeholders for images. Use the provided image_urls for the AI generation previews.
Implement a sticky sidebar layout for navigation. The sidebar should have a solid 1px or 2px black right border.
Use Sonner for toast notifications when content is generated, copied, or downloaded.
Center align only when intentional (e.g., hero titles or empty states). Prefer left alignment for forms and dense data.
Ensure the layout is mobile-responsive. Images must not exceed 80vh on mobile.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Do not converge toward generic outputs. Avoid the 'AI slop' aesthetic.
Dark colors look good independently; DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts. Create depth through layered design elements and z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters where appropriate (e.g., sticky headers), but ensure the background is not completely transparent.
DO NOT apply universal transition (`transition: all`). Target specific properties to prevent breaking transforms.
DO NOT center align the app container (`.App { text-align: center; }`).
Always use modern button styles (Neo-brutalist interaction states for this app).
Every interaction needs micro-animations (hover states, transitions, selection states).
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Use named exports for components and default exports for pages.
All interactive elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute.
